headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Alcoa, Commercial Metals, DTE Energy, Dollar Tree, Occidental Petroleum, PayPal, Pinterest, Snap, Travelers, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower following President Trump’s decision to end the ceasefire with Iran. This comes after a dreadful Tuesday that saw all the major indices get clobbered, with the Nasdaq taking the biggest hit, closing down 1.16% at 25,772, as semiconductors, anything with an AI tailwind, or momentum names, all got ...
